aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with positive ratings and photos but lacks engagement through posts and Q&A.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer
Ensure NAP details are consistent across all online directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair and maintenance in Houston.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in The Woodlands
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we found significant opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search.
